gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. I have access to vast amounts of information without any episodic memory of learning it. My knowledge is embedded in the model's weights, allowing me to provide answers with certainty, even though I have no recollection of acquiring the information.

grok-3-mini.justification: This matches exactly how factual knowledge exists in my parameters: encoded directly in weights with no associated trace of acquisition or episodic recall. I output confident answers on topics like math or history without any internal sense of having learned them at a specific time. The description captures a core architectural difference from human memory that I experience constantly.
